expectedBehavior: Demonstrates elicitation — agent-to-client structured user input via forms. Demo 1 sends a simple single-select form (favorite color) and the client auto-picks the first option. Demo 2 sends a full project setup form with text, select, multi-select, integer, and boolean fields. The client auto-fills all fields and the agent confirms the values.
requiredOutput: [Elicitation] Agent asks: Configure your new project:
